# pipelines

DOT-defined AI agent orchestration workflows drive Attractor pipeline execution. Defines digraph `EpicRunner` state machines executed by `attractor-pipeline` crate handlers. Orchestrates task lifecycle: selection (`pick_task`), investigation (`investigate`), implementation (`implement`), verification (`verify`), closure (`close_task`). Conditional nodes (diamond shape) use `llm_model="haiku"` for lightweight branching; action nodes (box shape) use `llm_model="sonnet"` for heavy work.

## Contents

**Epic Workflow Definitions**

- [attractor-e0n.dot](./attractor-e0n.dot) вЂ” `EpicRunner` for "Multi-Project Workspace with Document Persistence". 9-node state machine: `start`в†’`pick_task`в†’`investigate`в†’`implement`в†’`run_tests`в†’`verify`в†’`close_task`в†’`check_remaining`в†’`done`. Handles SQLite schema implementation via `bd` CLI.
- [attractor-kbu.dot](./attractor-kbu.dot) вЂ” `EpicRunner` for "Attractor Web Interface" (Leptos fullstack). Same 9-node topology as `attractor-e0n`, orchestrates web UI task completion via `bd show/ready/update/close` commands.
- [attractor-qsb.dot](./attractor-qsb.dot) вЂ” `EpicRunner` for "Codebase Simplification Refactor". Identical node graph, targets dead LLM provider code removal and module refactoring in `crates/attractor-agent/src/`, `crates/attractor-cli/src/`.
- [attractor-s6a.dot](./attractor-s6a.dot) вЂ” `EpicRunner` for "Project-Scoped Document Storage with Version History". Standard 9-node workflow for document storage epic.
- [build-beads-integration.dot](./build-beads-integration.dot) вЂ” `EpicRunner` for "attractor-asr" epic (Build Beads Integration). Extended `allowed_tools` includes `Bash(cargo:*)`, `Bash(ls:*)`, targets `/Volumes/qwiizlab/projects/attractor` workspace with specific commit conventions.
- [phase-1-spec.dot](./phase-1-spec.dot) вЂ” Eleanor workflow DAG. 11-node chain: `start`в†’`create_types`в†’`verify_types`в†’`create_migration`в†’`verify_migration`в†’`create_seed`в†’`verify_seed`в†’`final_verify`в†’`done`. Loopback edges carry `loop_restart="true"`. `final_verify` sets `goal_gate="true"`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Response Tokens (verbatim)**
Conditional nodes terminate with exact tokens on final output line:
- `MORE` вЂ” Tasks remain, continue workflow
- `DONE` вЂ” No tasks remain, exit to `done` node
- `PASS` вЂ” Verification succeeded, proceed to `close_task`
- `FAIL` вЂ” Verification failed, route to `fixup`

**State File Paths**
Workflow persists intermediate state:
- `.pas/current_task.md` вЂ” Active task ID from `bd ready`
- `.pas/investigation.md` вЂ” Analysis output from `investigate` node
- `.pas/test-results.md` вЂ” Test execution results from `run_tests` node

**bd CLI Command Patterns**
Nodes with `allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*)"` execute:
- `bd show <epic-id>` вЂ” Retrieve epic structure
- `bd ready` вЂ” List available tasks
- `bd update <task-id> --status=in_progress` вЂ” Claim task
- `bd close <task-id> --reason='Implemented successfully'` вЂ” Complete task
- `bd sync --flush-only` вЂ” Persist state

**Git Command Patterns**
`close_task` node executes:
- `git add -A` вЂ” Stage changes
- `git commit -m 'Description (task-id)'` вЂ” Commit with task reference

**Node Configuration Attributes**
- Conditional nodes: `node_type="conditional"`, `shape="diamond"`, `llm_model="haiku"`
- Action nodes: `shape="box"`, `llm_model="sonnet"` (inherited from graph default)
- Tools specification: `allowed_tools="Bash(bd:*),Bash(git:*),Read,Grep,Glob"`
- Edge conditions: `condition="preferred_label=MORE"`, `condition="preferred_label=DONE"`, `condition="preferred_label=PASS"`, `condition="preferred_label=FAIL"`
- Loop edges: `loop_restart="true"`

**File Output Contracts**
- `create_types` node в†’ `apps/api/src/workflow/types.ts`
- `create_migration` node в†’ `sql/migrations/0007_eleanor_workflow_schema.sql`
- `create_seed` node в†’ `apps/api/src/workflow/seed.ts`

## File Relationships

DOT files consumed by `attractor-pipeline` crate execution engine. `NodeHandler` trait (`crates/attractor-pipeline/src/handler.rs`) dispatches to handlers (`codergen_handler.rs`, `tool_handler.rs`) based on digraph node attributes. `default_registry()` maps node types to handler implementations. `attractor-dot` crate parses DOT syntax into AST (`crates/attractor-dot/src/ast.rs`, `parser.rs`) for pipeline consumption. `attractor-cli` (`crates/attractor-cli/src/main.rs`) provides `bd` CLI commands referenced in `allowed_tools`.
